summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Jordan are subject to dangerous-goods transport expectations. A BESS shipment normally needs UN 38.3 test evidence for cells and batteries, test summaries, classification, packing, marks and labels, and mode-specific air, sea, road, or multimodal documents before the product reaches the Jordan site.
summary.zh: 运往约旦的锂电芯和电池受危险货物运输要求约束。BESS货批通常需要电芯和电池的UN 38.3测试证据、测试概要、分类、包装、标志标签，以及空运、海运、公路或多式联运对应文件，才能送达约旦场址。
summary.zht: 運往約旦的鋰電芯和電池受危險貨物運輸要求約束。BESS貨批通常需要電芯和電池的UN 38.3測試證據、測試概要、分類、包裝、標誌標籤，以及空運、海運、公路或多式聯運對應文件，才能送達約旦場址。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Sub-section 38.3
UN Model Regulations dangerous-goods classification for lithium batteries
Applicable ICAO / IATA, IMDG, road, customs, carrier, and port requirements

summary.en: China export files often include UN 38.3 reports, MSDS / SDS, transport appraisal certificates, and lithium-battery marks. These are useful only if they match the exact cell, module, battery, state of charge, packaging, and shipment mode used for Jordan.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常包括UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、运输鉴定书和锂电池标志。只有当其对应具体电芯、模组、电池、荷电状态、包装和运往约旦的运输方式时，这些文件才有用。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常包括UN 38.3報告、MSDS／SDS、運輸鑑定書和鋰電池標誌。只有當其對應具體電芯、模組、電池、荷電狀態、包裝和運往約旦的運輸方式時，這些文件才有用。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary
SDS / MSDS for lithium battery shipment

gap.en: Match the transport file to the final shipment configuration. Re-check large containerized BESS units, spare batteries, replacement modules, damaged or prototype batteries, and mixed consignments because transport classification can change even when product safety evidence is unchanged.
gap.zh: 应使运输文件匹配最终货批配置。大型集装箱式BESS、备件电池、替换模组、损坏或样品电池以及混装货物需要重新核查，因为即使产品安全证据不变，运输分类也可能变化。
gap.zht: 應使運輸文件匹配最終貨批配置。大型集裝箱式BESS、備件電池、替換模組、損壞或樣品電池以及混裝貨物需要重新核查，因為即使產品安全證據不變，運輸分類也可能變化。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium batteries transported as dangerous goods where UN 38.3, carrier, port, customs, or modal transport rules apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China export transport where lithium-battery dangerous-goods transport rules, carrier rules, or customs documentation require UN 38.3 and related evidence

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a shipment gate, not a Jordan market certificate. Verify the exact BESS logistics route before booking or customs filing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输关口，不是约旦市场证书。订舱或报关前应核验具体BESS物流路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸關口，不是約旦市場證書。訂艙或報關前應核驗具體BESS物流路徑。
